description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push to the master branch in the src-python folder and on pull request events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) in parallel. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python, install the package locally, install dev dependencies from extras/dev.txt, and run tests with pytest.
